understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate the tile grid by moving left/right and removing breakable blocks with clicks, allowing gravity to pull the player downward through passages and ultimately land on the goal gem tile marked '+'.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: After each MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT, gravity (downward in this level) takes over, making the player fall until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. Spike tiles end the run immediately. Breakable blocks ('x') can be removed with CLICK at a specified [x,y] position, which does not move the player but can open a falling path. UNDO reverts the last action. Each attempt has a turn limit, and the level could be retried if failed.
